title: Agents
description: Create and manage AI agents that can execute complex workflows autonomously

sections.title: AI Agents
sections.subtitle: Build autonomous agents that execute complex tasks
sections.description: Agents are the core of your automation platform. They can perform sequences of actions, make decisions, and interact with external systems - all without manual intervention.

sections.title: What are Agents?
sections.content:
Agents are intelligent automation units that can:

• **Execute Tasks**: Run complex workflows automatically
• **Make Decisions**: Use AI to choose appropriate actions
• **Connect Systems**: Integrate with external APIs and services
• **Learn & Adapt**: Improve performance over time
• **Scale Operations**: Handle multiple tasks simultaneously

items.title: Smart Execution
items.description: Agents use AI models to understand context and make intelligent decisions during task execution

items.title: Custom Functions
items.description: Extend agent capabilities with custom functions for specific business logic and integrations

items.title: Template Integration
items.description: Use execution templates to define repeatable workflows that agents can follow consistently

items.title: API Management
items.description: Configure agent-specific API keys for secure access to external services and platforms

steps.title: Navigate to Agents
steps.description: Go to the Agents section to view and manage your AI agents

steps.title: Create New Agent
steps.description: Click the 'Create Agent' button to start building your first automation agent
steps.details: You'll need to provide a name, description, and select the AI model your agent will use

steps.title: Configure Settings
steps.description: Set up your agent's behavior, including response parameters and execution preferences
steps.details: Configure temperature, max tokens, and other model parameters to control how your agent responds

steps.title: Add Functions
steps.description: Attach custom functions that extend your agent's capabilities

steps.title: Test & Deploy
steps.description: Run test executions to validate your agent's behavior before deploying to production

cases.title: Customer Support Automation
cases.description: Handle customer inquiries, route tickets, and provide instant responses
cases.example: Agent analyzes support requests and automatically assigns them to appropriate teams

cases.title: Data Processing Workflows
cases.description: Process, analyze, and transform data from multiple sources automatically
cases.example: Agent extracts data from APIs, processes it, and updates your database

cases.title: Content Generation
cases.description: Create personalized content, reports, and communications at scale
cases.example: Agent generates weekly reports based on performance metrics and KPIs

cases.title: System Monitoring
cases.description: Monitor systems, detect anomalies, and trigger automated responses
cases.example: Agent monitors server health and automatically scales resources when needed

sections.title: Best Practices
tips: 🎯 **Clear Purpose**: Define specific, measurable goals for each agent
🧪 **Test Thoroughly**: Always test agents in a safe environment before production use
🔒 **Secure Configuration**: Use agent-specific API keys and limit permissions appropriately
📊 **Monitor Performance**: Regularly review agent execution logs and performance metrics
🔄 **Iterate & Improve**: Continuously refine agent prompts and configurations based on results
👥 **Team Collaboration**: Use team features to organize and share agents across your organization

solutions: Check system prompt clarity and specificity
Verify all required functions are attached
Review API key configurations and permissions
Increase timeout settings in agent configuration
Break complex tasks into smaller steps
Lower temperature setting for more deterministic responses
Provide more specific instructions in system prompt
Use execution templates for consistent workflows
Add validation functions to check outputs
